codeExamples.curl:
curl -X POST 'http://localhost:3010/auth/key-request' \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"appName":"Test Discord Bot","appDescription":"A test integration","scopes":["entity:read","roll:read","chat:read"]}'
codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3010'
path = '/auth/key-request'
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.post(
    url,
    json={
      "appName": "Test Discord Bot",
      "appDescription": "A test integration",
      "scopes": [
        "entity:read",
        "roll:read",
        "chat:read"
      ]
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)
codeExamples.emojicode:
📦 sockets 🏠

💭 Emojicode HTTP Client
💭 Compile: emojicodec example.🍇 -o example
💭 Run: ./example

  💭 Build HTTP request

  💭 Connect and send
  🍺 🆕📞 host port❗ ➡️ socket
  🍺 💬 socket 📇 request❗❗
  
  💭 Read and print response
  🍺 👂 socket 4096❗ ➡️ data
  😀 🍺 🔡 data❗❗
  
  💭 Close socket
  🚪 socket❗

codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3010'
path = '/auth/key-request/YMHVXR'
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.get(
    url,
    headers={
        'Authorization': 'Bearer 288adad9312ec64eff74b5bb706b29916ee70d053366d1def53f90cf74ff55cc'
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)

codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3010'
path = '/auth/key-request/exchange'
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.post(
    url,
    json={
      "code": "e4913c622f868a6ccbc2a7bf416dcfc4"
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)
